ddls:
CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "sac_code" INTEGER /* Standard Accounting Code (SAC) assigned to the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the service was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the service was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_categories" (
  "service_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the service category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the service category was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the service category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate entry */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service */,
  "rate" REAL /* Tax rate percentage for the service */,
  "cess" TEXT /* CESS (additional tax) rate for the service */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the tax rate and cess are effective */,
  "cess_condition" TEXT /* Condition for CESS applicability */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the tax rate was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the tax rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rate_revisions" (
  "tax_rate_revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate revision */,
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax rate */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rate was revised */,
  "revised_rate" REAL /* Revised tax rate percentage */,
  "revised_cess" TEXT /* Revised CESS (additional tax) rate */,
  "revision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the revision */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the tax rate revision was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the tax rate revision was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rate_revisions_tax_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("tax_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tax_rate_mappings" (
  "event_tax_rate_mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-tax rate mapping */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax rate */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the event-tax rate mapping was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the event-tax rate mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_tax_rate_mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tax_rate_mappings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tax_rate_mappings_tax_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("tax_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tax rate */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "certification_description" TEXT /* Description of the certification */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification expires */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the certification was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the certification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_tax_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("tax_rate_id") REFERENCES tax_rates ("tax_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, tax officer, service provider) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user permission was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
